programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.desc: When an eight-month-old baby is fatally injured while in the care of his nanny Louise Woodward, was is abuse or an accident?

programme.desc: Two year-old Florida toddler Caylee Anthony vanished in 2008. Her mother Casey Anthony tells investigators that Caylee has been kidnapped by a nanny that no one in the family has seen before.

programme.desc: Well known and liked Dartmouth College professors Half and Suzanne Zantop’s incredible lives came to a shocking end: found brutally murdered in their home. With few leads and clues investigators were stumped.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Dartmouth Murders: Evil in a Small Town

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: Gods, Guns and Government (Part 1)

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Who Else Knew? (Part 2)
programme.desc: The news of Bernie Madoff’s arrest sent shockwaves around the world. Investigators were about to unravel a scheme that went back decades and involved several loyal employees.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: No Country for Gold Men

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leather Tanner
programme.desc: Mike steps back in time when he joins Richard Meyers and his sons in the ancient art of tanning leather. At their tannery in New York Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty turning stiff cowhides into soft suede soles for bowling shoes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fireworks Technician
programme.desc: Mike travels to Pennsylvania to learn what it takes to be a fireworks technician. He then heads to the Arkansas State University to check out a cow with a hole in it's stomach.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Abandoned Mine Plugger

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Glass Maker
programme.desc: Mike goes to Jonesboro, Arkansas to perform some research using Dung Beetles, then he heads to Williamstown, West Virginia to try his hand at making some glass art.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Scrapple Maker

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Threesome
programme.desc: When a third survivalist crashes the challenge, tension and jealousy are just as threatening as the piranha and jaguars of the Ecuadorian rainforest. Then 1,800 miles away, an Alaskan homesteader is punished by the 130-degree heat of the Mexican jungle.

programme.title: Return to Amish: The Time Has Come

programme.title: Return to Amish: The DNA Test Request

programme.title: Sister Wives: Can I Light You Up?
programme.desc: Kody finally returns to Janelle's house, but the larger family conflict over COVID-19 rules continues to grow. Then, it's Kody and Meri's 30th anniversary, and Kody shows no interest in rekindling a romance, despite Meri's intense interest.

programme.title: Sister Wives: A Family Stuck

programme.title: Storage Wars: LBC U LTR

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sun Up to Show Down
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee determine whether Mychael Bonner and Anna Maria have what it takes to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting an authentic taste of all ends of the earth. In Bakersfield, Calif., the firehouse-turned-restaurant firing up Latin-fusion favorites like basque lamb tacos and popcorn pork with a side of zing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Lover's Paradise
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's signing up for a meat-crazed master class. In Portland, Ore., the craft-cooking family joint with a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Bowlful of Soul
programme.desc: In Charlotte, N.C., a down-home hangout dishes out low country favourites, like killer collard greens and standout shrimp and grits. In Las Vegas, a strip mall spot serves up both savoury and sweet crepe specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef It Up
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's divin' into menus boasting the bomb beef.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Briskets
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into everything from chicken to brisket. In Fargo, N.D., a funky place piling barbecue onto mac and throwin' heat into wings. A Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Great Gear
programme.desc: Guy's grabbing grub cooked up with some great gear. In San Francisco, a place firin' up lights-out lamb and huge pork biscuits in some of the city's last remaining indoor smokers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory with a Side of Sweet
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is jumping into some sweet and savory dishes. In Burlington, Vt., a vegan joint gettin' crazy with a crunch wrap and coconut-banana French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Let's Get It Percolating
programme.desc: After meeting a friend for java, Trisha makes a coffee-inspired menu that includes coffee coffee cake, coffee-rubbed fish tacos, and a tiramisu affogato.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Play Like A Girl
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, volunteer for snack duty with the non-profit organization Play Like a Girl, which encourages girls to participate in sports to build confidence.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Amy's in the House!
programme.desc: Valerie prepares inspiring Italian dishes like ribollita, porchetta cantaloupe and radicchio salad.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Pasta Perfect
programme.desc: Inspired by a cooking class she took in Italy, Valerie Bertinelli invites her Italian hosts and friends over for a meal of Italian classics done her way.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Project Pens
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making an energizing tailgate lunch for a crew of cowboy fixers. She makes them poppin' pork chop sandwiches and homemade pickles, roasted corn with flour-chili butter, and lemon lime cupcakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Back Office Bash
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her team are having a casual office-warming party at their new space in town. For the appetizer menu, Ree makes maple bacon dip with apples, easy Italian cheese sticks and marinara sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faster Pasta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making pasta dishes in no time at all. She whips up steakhouse pasta with grilled steak, and her lemon pasta pronto is scattered with glorious flecks of pink and green.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Spring is in the Air
programme.desc: Ree Drummond celebrates springtime with seasonal recipes like shrimp with zucchini noodles and an easy lamb stew. She uses a shortcut for cheesy ham and egg hand pies that everyone loves, and her grain salad is fresh, vibrant and super simple.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's Horn Show and the Late-Night Munchies
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making hearty cheeseburger potato soup for dinner. Then, after Nick's band gig, it's time for a sinful spread of late-night munchies with veggie supreme pizza bagels, loaded cheesy pickle nachos and adorable iced dinosaur cookies for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Norwegian Celebration
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is cooking for a Norwegian dinner celebration on the farm, starting with Lefse hot dogs with fennel slaw and open face salmon and avocado sandwiches. She also makes crispy paprika fries with dill mayo and a stunning Norwegian wreath cake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: High School Reunion
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister Beth invite their high school BFF over to reminisce about old memories over a delicious meal. They share a few laughs together before enjoying a menu made of classics from their high school days.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breaking Bread with Julie
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her longtime friend, Julie, into the kitchen for a day celebrating all things bread. As they swap childhood bread-making stories, they create a tasty menu.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Switch Up Your Spring Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen is rewriting the rule book for a spring feast with fun, new recipes that include jalapeno honey ham, easy rosemary deviled potatoes and chocolate matzoh bark for dessert. Plus, the hosts craft beautiful and simple metallic Easter eggs.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: The Bracket Begins
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the final 16 chefs into the Tournament of Champions arena and reveals the new and returning chefs' seeds and matchups.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Round One Continues
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hosts as Tournament of Champions continues with first round battles. In one-on-one sudden death confrontations, three chefs conquer their opponents and the Randomizer to move on to the quarterfinals, and three chefs are eliminated and head home.

programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Finding a Felon
programme.desc: In Texas, Game Wardens are the guardians of the state's wildlife. Game Warden Herchman saves an owl, while Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up to work a case in an archery-only county. Game Wardens Benge and King investigate a poaching case.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run
programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Rattled
programme.desc: In Jasper County, Game Warden Boone responds to a venomous rattlesnake. Game wardens investigate the illegal killing of a goose in the Texas Panhandle. In South Texas, Game Wardens follow up on a tip about a man going over the fishing limit.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Suspicious Encounters
programme.desc: A check for a fishing license takes an unlikely turn and an abandoned car is found on private property. Wardens Sellers and Roraback are in pursuit of illicit hunters, and zebra mussels are suspected of being illegally transported in Llano County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparking Disaster
programme.desc: During wildfire season, Game Warden Dustin Delgado catches people throwing out lit cigarettes and stops them in their tracks. Game Warden Cynde Aguilar helps hunt down the criminal of a high-speed chase, and a call is made about a gator lurking in a pond.

programme.title: Food Paradise International: Pork Paradise
programme.desc: The world's most sizzling pork pleasures. From sweet applewood pulled pork in South Africa, to soft fatty juice-dripping porchetta in Rome, to a smoky pork loin soaked in a spicy marinade in Tokyo.

programme.title: Food Paradise International: Deep Fried Paradise
programme.desc: The yummiest fried dishes across the globe is featured. From crispy, buttermilk fried chicken in Paris, to rich and nutty deep-fried lobster in Barcelona, to a beer battered bacon wrapped jalapeno popper oozing with cheese in South Africa.

programme.title: Food Paradise International: Steak Paradise
programme.desc: The juiciest steaks around the world. Starring a medium rare Porterhouse oozing with deliciousness in Sydney, an Angus tenderloin drenched in butter in Barcelona, and a sweet and spicy prime fillet in South Africa.

programme.title: Food Paradise International: BBQ Paradise
programme.desc: Earth's best BBQ. From a juicy sirloin with a crispy caramelized crust, doused in a wine sauce in Rome, to a crispy rotisserie chicken rubbed in spicy deliciousness in Sydney, to tender legs of lamb in Barcelona.

programme.title: Food Paradise International: Burger Paradise
programme.desc: Burgers are taking over the world -- from boozed up beef dripping with blue cheese in Paris and a juicy patty oozing crispy bacon to sweet barbecue sauce in Buenos Aires and tender Wagyu beef doused in teriyaki in Tokyo.

programme.title: The Haunted Collector Files: Louisiana Landlord
programme.desc: John Zaffis and his team head down to Louisiana to help a landlord who is losing tenants to paranormal activity. They then investigate Connecticut library where an entity torments visitors.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: The Hunt Is On
programme.desc: Don goes on a local TV show to reach out to the public about their Bigfoot sightings. The GCBRO travel to a rural area, where a family claims Bigfoot killed several of their dogs and even attacked a young man. The hunt is on when another dog goes missing.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Sasquatch Nests
programme.desc: Bobby and Brandi bring the GCBRO to help out a lady whose home and pets have been attacked by Bigfoot and she's taken some shots at the creature. A nearby eyewitness leads the team to possible Sasquatch nests. The hunt reveals some frightening encounters.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Giant Swamp Creature
programme.desc: Gulf Coast Bigfoot Research Organization (GCBRO) founders Bobby Hamilton and Jim Lansdale lead a team of commandos on a mission to find and kill a Bigfoot in order to prove its existence to science and protect the public from a future attack.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Knock, Knock, It's Bigfoot
programme.desc: The GCBRO rushes in to help a young woman and her physically challenged husband who say they're being terrorized by Bigfoot pounding on the walls of their house. The team finds a huge handprint in the mud, twice the size of a human hand. The hunt is on.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a pushy businesswoman learns that her VISA has run out and she'll be deported back to Canada, she forces her assistant to marry her. Her assistant agrees to the plan, but only if she promises to give him a promotion.

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a pushy businesswoman learns that her VISA has run out and she'll be deported back to Canada, she forces her assistant to marry her. Her assistant agrees to the plan, but only if she promises to give him a promotion.

programme.title: Movie: Home Again
programme.desc: After separating from her husband, a mother meets three aspiring filmmakers at a club who have nowhere to live. She invites them to live in her guest house and starts a romance with one of them, a situation that is complicated when her husband shows up.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: No Justice, No Peace
programme.desc: Porsha's involvement in the Black Lives Matter movement leads her to Louisville, Kentucky, where she risks everything to demand justice for Breonna Taylor.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: New Peach in the Orchard
programme.desc: Porsha's release from prison after protesting further ignites her activism. Actress and songstress Drew Sidora brings her Chi-Town flavor to Atlanta, however her marriage is anything but picture perfect.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ten Ten, Twenty Twenty
programme.desc: Porsha returns home from her second arrest in Kentucky and also reveals that she and Dennis have called it quits. Kenya offers Cynthia marital advice and juggles her fast track friendship with LaToya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: From One Surprise to Another
programme.desc: Cynthia gets some tough love from Kenya after her big argument with Mike. Kenya feels bad about a past mistake and asks Kandi for help to make things right. Drew and Ralph start couples counseling.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Don't Come for Me Unless I've Invited You
programme.desc: After nearly spoiling Cynthia's proposal last year, Kenya seeks redemption with a surprise engagement dinner. Kenya uses the opportunity to confront Porsha about being uninvited to her party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Giving Peach
programme.desc: Cynthia grapples with the decision of whether to invite her father to the wedding, knowing that her mother will disapprove. Kandi organizes a food drive to help provide groceries to local families in need.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Jet Set and the Upset
programme.desc: Drew hosts a Hollywood-themed dinner where Porsha brings up some messy gossip. Kandi starts planning a very special surprise for Cynthia.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Beach, Please!
programme.desc: The ladies arrive in Isle of Palms, South Carolina, and are immediately faced with an unexpected mystery. Tensions flare between Drew and Latoya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Hostess with the Least-est
programme.desc: As the Isle of Palms girls’ trip continues, the drama between Marlo and Kenya reaches new heights. Porsha’s heart is still focused on how she can continue her activism as she struggles to cope with the verdict in the Breonna Taylor murder case.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: What Happened in the Dungeon?
programme.desc: The ladies participate in a dungeon-themed surprise bachelorette party for Cynthia’s last days as a Bailey. Afterwards, the ladies continue with a crazy, after party that leads to accusations, denials, and breaking of girl code.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: The final dinner in Isle of Palms ends on a sour note after Kenya’s investigation. Upon returning home to Atlanta, Drew is overwhelmed with the move into her new home. Porsha comes to a realization about her breakup with Dennis.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Front Page News
programme.desc: Marlo invites the ladies to saddle up for a hayride, but the fun is interrupted by news that unearths trust issues within the group. Drew and Kenya meet up to clear the air, but they quickly learn that their potential friendship is out of tune.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: 10.10.20
programme.desc: Cynthia and Mike’s big day has arrived! Meanwhile, more press leaks about the weekend in South Carolina have spread, leading the women to speculate who the source might be. Shamea attempts to shelter the nieces from the judgmental aunties.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: If You've Got It, Haunt It

programme.title: Counting Cars: Politically Correct
programme.desc: Danny and Shannon honour fallen troops with a custom patriotic motorcycle. Later, Danny and Kevin push the limit to acquire a `71 Monte Carlo.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Horn Ultimatum
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Quadzilla
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin visit mad mechanic Gordon to see his latest insane creation. Later, Danny tries to turn a '34 Ford into a hot rod.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Danny decides to host a huge car show at his club Vamp'd to drum up business and get the local gearheads together. He brings along a classic Harley he's turned into a hardtail chopper in hopes of flipping it for a big profit.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Full Monte
programme.desc: Inspired by the Rat Rods at a local shop, Danny sends the guys out to find parts for a Count's Kustoms Rat Rod. While on the hunt, Danny gets distracted by a beauty of a Bel Air.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The King and the Count
programme.desc: Kevin and the team come together to make something special for Danny. Meanwhile Danny runs into an old pal and his 1959 Corvette gasser, but it's a ride once owned by the King himself that brings Danny to his knees.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fast and Furry-ous
programme.desc: Danny scores a pimp-tastic 1967 Impala, but when it's time to hand over the keys to an important client, Danny doesn't think he can let her go. Meanwhile, Roli does the unthinkable and puts the shop's top project in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Superfine Econoline
programme.desc: Danny makes an old Ford Econoline look so cool that, in the end, two buyers get into a bidding war for it. Danny can score big, but only if he can let his baby go. Also, Mike and Roli find a BMW motorcycle with a lot of history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bonneville Bound
programme.desc: The Turbinator, the vehicle holding a land speed record, needs a paint job to make it look as fast as it goes. Danny decides the crew should be there in Bonneville, Utah when it goes for the speed record again.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bonneville Bound
programme.desc: Ryan and Kevin go to the Bonneville Salt Flats to see The Turbinator try to break 500 MPH. Back at the shop, Davey Deals asks Danny to help him sell a classic 1951 Nash, and Mike and Paul trick out an electric bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's Detroit Special
programme.desc: Danny restores a 1069 Shelby GT500 from a rust bucket into a classic. The team heads to the Detroit Autorama to check out the Ridler Award competition where expensive cars are the norm. Then, Danny sells two meaningful cars from his personal collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count Down to SEMA
programme.desc: Danny and the guys attempt to complete a 1961 Cadillac Coup de Ville to get two cars into the world's largest auto trade show.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Magic Bus
programme.desc: Danny and the guys get to work transforming a 1960 Volkswagen Bus into a high end luxury beach cruise, but a hiccup may derail the project. Meanwhile, Ryan and Ghetto Bob give a very rare 1963 split window Corvette a wicked facelift.

programme.title: Counting Cars: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Danny and the crew build the ultimate fully customized 1968 Dodge Charger. Meanwhile, Ryan and Shannon restore a 1959 Harley Davidson Panhead Chopper.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Alice Cooper's Dream
programme.desc: Rock legend Alice Cooper comes to Counts Kustoms to give his '63 Studebaker Avanti a special treatment. Plus, the crew decides to restore a historic 1937 fire truck.

programme.title: Movie: Mildred Pierce
programme.desc: Divorcée Mildred Pierce turns herself into a business tycoon to win her selfish daughter a place in society. Betrayal leads to murder when her daughter schemes with Mildred's husband and leaves her bankrupt.

programme.title: Movie: Million Dollar Mermaid
programme.desc: A swimming champion's new manager arranges several publicity stunts to make her a star.

programme.title: Movie: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: A determined woman struggles to teach the blind, mute and deaf Helen Keller.

programme.title: Movie: Mister Roberts
programme.desc: An officer aboard a ship yearns for combat duty while his friends play practical jokes.

programme.title: Movie: Mogambo
programme.desc: An anthropologist hires a safari leader to escort him into the deepest, darkest jungle. The hunter soon becomes torn between his love for a lusty showgirl and a married woman.

programme.title: Movie: Mona Lisa
programme.desc: A vulnerable ex-con delivers porn videos and acts as chauffeur to a high class prostitute.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Hulot's Holiday
programme.desc: The story of a man's vacation at the seashore and the mishaps that occur along the way.

programme.title: Movie: Mystery Street

programme.desc: When Brooks lands a job in Africa and has to be there in two days, he and Jessie are forced to move up their wedding.

programme.desc: Delve into how the railway became a key player in the expansion of the Nazi empire.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures: Hitler's Railways of Death
programme.desc: The railway became a means by which the Nazis could implement their 'Final Solution,' taking the Jewish people to concentration camps.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand: The Lost World
programme.desc: Discover New Zealand's most ancient and interesting species as we explore how this spectacular land was formed and how it's extreme isolation both protected and transformed these native creatures.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand: Middle Earth
programme.desc: Witness the ways in which New Zealand's resourceful and ingenious wildlife have adapted to survive.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Realm of the Wombat
programme.desc: The hostile dry plains of southern Australia are home to some extraordinary and lethal animals including deadly ants, killer bunnies and the surprisingly vicious wombat.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Jurassic Jungle
programme.desc: The Australian tropics are perhaps the most mysterious part of the country. Impenetrable rainforest hides kangaroos that live in trees and a colossal bird with dinosaur feet.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Desert of the Red Kangaroo
programme.desc: In the heart of Australia lives the red kangaroo, the largest marsupial on earth and a true master of adapting to the blistering desert heat.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Chimp Change
programme.desc: Naomi the chimp overcomes a medical condition and finally becomes a mum.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: New Neck of the Woods
programme.desc: Taronga Zoo’s new African Savanna Precinct welcomes its residents.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Hungry, Hungry Hippo
programme.desc: Keepers at Taronga’s zoo in Dubbo welcome a baby hippo to the herd.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Sealing the Deal
programme.desc: Keepers at Taronga Zoo work tirelessly to save the lives of injured seals.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Bear Necessities
programme.desc: It’s spring at ZooTampa, and the animals are emerging from hibernation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Ice Station
programme.desc: Satellites capture images of a strange oval formation in the remote and uninhabitable, icy wilderness of Antarctica; experts speculate a possible abandoned research facility with a classified and mysterious past.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Cotton, Rodeo Roping Chutes, Asian Noodles and Rotary Engines
programme.desc: Features cotton, rodeo roping chutes, Asian noodles and rotary engines.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Betrayed: Dying to be Popular
programme.desc: Becky Stowe is an eager 15-year-old looking for love. When she suddenly disappears, friends and family wonder if love finally found her, or if it was something far more sinister.

programme.title: Disappeared: A Date with Danger
programme.desc: Nancy Moyer isn't home when her kids come back from visiting their dad. Police look into her background, and find a more complicated life than anyone knows.

programme.title: Disappeared: So Close to Home
programme.desc: Ali Lowizter vanishes after getting off the school bus. The investigation stalls for two years until a tip comes in claiming Ali could have been trafficked.

programme.title: Disappeared: Spirited Away
programme.desc: Twenty-one year-old Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed one night following a couple of scuffles with neighbors and friends. Investigators pursue various leads, but the young beauty is nowhere to be found, and her family clings to an endless hope.

programme.title: Disappeared: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: While on a Caribbean cruise, 23-year old Amy Bradley vanishes from her family's cabin and is never seen again. Over a decades-long struggle, her family embarks on countless grueling searches, stopping at nothing, they say, to find their beloved Amy.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Stop
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes walking to her bus stop in Nashville, TN. Police think she's a runaway but it appears that there are disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Disappeared: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: When 70-year-old retired firefighter Michael Chambers goes missing, a bloody crime scene in his garage quickly indicates foul play. But authorities begin to believe that the crime scene may have been staged and that Michael may have left on his own.

programme.title: Disappeared: Just Out of Sight
programme.desc: When Michael VanZandt, a veteran and father of three, disappears one night in Hermosa Beach, Ca., police suspect a group of strangers may be involved. But his loved ones are haunted by suspicions about his thrill seeking when considering his fate.

programme.title: Disappeared: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: A young man gets life-changing news and drops everything to start a new chapter. But when he never calls home again his family knows something is wrong. Police begin to investigate but encounter a tangled web of contradictory stories.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: Greg May, 56, is getting ready to move to Florida with a new girlfriend when he vanishes without a trace. Police aren't sure if the tattoo artist turned Civil War collector is alive or dead until their investigation uncovers a horrific plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Body In The Rug
programme.desc: The search for the infamous serial killer who murdered world famous fashion designer, Gianni Versace, begins when investigators find a body rolled up in a rug at architect David Madson's Minneapolis apartment.

programme.title: Dateline: A Perfect Spot
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day tryst for a Georgia couple takes a deadly turn. Investigators find themselves stumped until evidence of tire treads at the crime scene and a string of cell phone calls reveal a twisted plot of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Without a Trace
programme.desc: When 29-year-old Carrie Olson doesn’t show up for work and is reported missing, an entire community pulls together in the search. Detectives suspect foul play and soon focus their investigation on two men in her life.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: Homicide City: Last Hope
programme.desc: More than two decades after two women are found similarly raped and strangled in North Philadelphia, there's renewed hope that breakthroughs in DNA technology could finally lead detectives to a brutal killer on the loose.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: It's a Christmas day murder scene Portland detectives will never forget, a young woman bound, gagged and mutilated in a horrific manner. And when the killer then turns his sick sights on Homicide Detective Molly Daul, the stakes rise even higher.

programme.title: True Conviction: Family Under Fire
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania family is decimated when masked men ambush them at home with guns and crude bombs, killing a mom and her daughter. The shell-shocked family points the finger at one of their own, but lack of evidence stalls the case for 30 agonizing years.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using just a mere shred of evidence and his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Appalachia
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates how Eric Jones, the son of a preacher, allegedly turned to murder. Later, Callahan Walsh tries to make sense of how a dispute over a dog could provoke Ricardo Villanueva Cordova to reportedly commit murder in broad daylight.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Back of the Shed
programme.desc: A backyard shed in a Michigan trailer park holds the answers to a dark secret regarding a missing teenage couple. Police interview their families, but one member is evasive, deepening the mystery and setting off a covert manhunt across the Midwest.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Nomadic Suburbanites Seek Unique Retro Residence
programme.desc: The Ivy family is looking for their final home after moving eight times. Chip and Jo take them on a tour of three completely different homes that all pose different renovation challenges and feel the pressure as they transform an outdated home.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Single Mom Starts New Life With Fixer Upper
programme.desc: After a difficult divorce, Karla's ready to move on from the hardest time of her life to the happiest. Chip calls her neighbourhood the 'Heartbeat of Waco,' where every home has its own charm and unique story.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Client Rebuilds Life With Renovated Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo's client, Carolyn, is rebuilding her life after losing her home and her husband. The Gaines show Carolyn three fixer uppers in her hometown of West, Texas, a tight-knit community still recovering from a devastating fertilizer plant explosion.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Newlyweds Take on a Run-Down Fixer for Their Future Together
programme.desc: Ken and Kelly Downs are a recently wed couple looking for a home they can both call their own.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Tiny House, Big Charm
programme.desc: Cameron and Jessie Bell currently live in a 690-square-foot house and love the cozy charm of small-scale living. While they're not necessarily looking for a larger space, they do want a place to call their own, and they need Chip and Joanna's help.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Home for Country Living
programme.desc: The rolling hills surrounding Waco, Texas are beckoning to Todd and Lexia Meek. They're looking for a house with several acres of land as well as a big kitchen and lots of space to entertain.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Chip and Jo Bring a Relaxing Coastal Feel to a Rural Fixer
programme.desc: After living in five homes in six years, Chris and Lindy are ready to settle down into a forever home. They like the Hewitt area of Texas due to its close proximity to jobs and family.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Large on Long Island, New York
programme.desc: A couple looks for a cozy beach home in the North Fork of Long Island, New York, for their family of six to enjoy throughout the year. They find a diamond in the rough and have big plans to update the look and transform it into a bright, welcoming space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Retreat
programme.desc: Vicky and Rome are looking to trade in the hustle and bustle of life in New York for the sun and surf of Flagler Beach, Florida. They find an oceanfront property perfect for their new lifestyle, but it's in need of a major overhaul.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Surfside Revive in Texas
programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Oat Cuisine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2001 with new recipes for his favourite grain, including a no-cook overnight oat pudding and a flavor-charged granola, now with more nutrition!

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' this episode from season six with two new buttercreams, including one curious model flavored with buttermilk.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Knibb

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cantu
programme.desc: Chef Masaharu Morimoto hopes to reign supreme following his battle with Chef Homaru Cantu.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Sutherland

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Talde
programme.desc: Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Challenger Dale Talde, the Executive Chef at Tald.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Boulder
programme.desc: Ali hits the ground running in Boulder at a diner with pancakes so manly, only a chef who moonlights as a strong man could make them. Ali then seeks out some of the most authentic Chinese noodles found on the West Coast.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Austin
programme.desc: Ali reveal the best meals that Austin has to offer in a sweet and savory stop that includes: migas tacos at a popular roadside stop, authentic Texas barbecue, a buttery journey in baking and a Bayou experience straight from MawMaw's recipe book.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Eating Vermont
programme.desc: Ali kicks things off with a local favorite for breakfast in Burlington, Vermont.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Santa Barbara Bargains
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Santa Barbara, Calif. He has a bacon and egg sandwich on a buttery brioche, bacon wrapped, fully loaded hot dogs, and a dairy-free "cowboy cookie," a local favourite.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Belly Full In Buffalo
programme.desc: Ali Khan is eating his way through the best meal deals in Buffalo, starting with griddle toast logs with cream cheese filling. For lunch, he takes down a trio of flavorful and innovative tacos.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson turns the clock back to being a kid, when life was simpler, and food tasted better. So, enjoy a blast from the past while we revisit some childhood favorites.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Food Truck Frenzy
programme.desc: Whether it's mouthwatering burgers, tacos with a twist, or delicious desserts, there's a food truck for just about anything you're craving.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New York
programme.desc: We're in New York City for a tour of the town's best eats. From Velselka's borscht in the East Village to smoked herring on the Upper West Side.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Mexico
programme.desc: The frontier spirit can still be found in New Mexico even when it comes to the food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cork
programme.desc: Andrew explores the charismatic city of Cork, Ireland, where fertile land and an expansive coastline make it a food lovers' haven. Locals line up for traditional favorites and artisanal delicacies like Irish stew and drisheen.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Curacao
programme.desc: Andrew enjoys bold, tropical flavors on the Caribbean island of Curacao.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: A Right Royal Rumble / Dal-Martians
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part I: The Night of De Spell
programme.desc: After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Issue 188
programme.desc: As Hiro tries to find a way to connect to classmate Karmi, Go Go and Fred dive deep into comic book mythology to defeat High Voltage, a mother-daughter supervillain duo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero 7
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muirahara Woods
programme.desc: Hiro, Fred, and Baymax follow the secretive Go Go into the mysterious Muirahara Woods where they get lost and, even worse, everything electronic strangely fails, including Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mr. Sparkles Loses His Sparkle
programme.desc: Mr. Sparkles, a deranged game show host, threatens Mochi, forcing Go Go to get over her fear of looking stupid in public to beat his crazy obstacles.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: Contest of Champions: Part One
programme.desc: Spider-Man, The Avengers, and The Agents of S.M.A.S.H. must battle their greatest foes for the fate of the planet.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: Contest of Champions: Part Two
programme.desc: The Collector and the Grandmaster's game continues as Spider-Man teams up with members from the Avengers and the Agents of S.M.A.S.H. to play for the fate of the planet.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: Contest of Champions: Part Three
programme.desc: Spider-Man has to change the rules of The Grandmaster's game to save the citizens of New York and prevent the villains from taking over Earth.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: Contest of Champions: Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man fights side-by-side with The Collector in an attempt to free all of Earth's heroes and villains from the Grandmaster and set everything right again.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Conquering the Ogre's Dungeon!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Jet-Black Sun! Vex Lucius!
Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Girl's Day Out / The Woof Factor
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Webby sets out to prove to a homesick Penumbra that Earth can be a lot of fun by riding Glomgold's newest gift to Duckburg, the suspicious Flintferris Glomwheel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Four Monsters and a Funeral/ Rainbow Doom
programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drac to the Future
programme.desc: The self-updating tome, The Monstroso Serioso, is on display at Hotel Transylvania. While looking at the book, Kitty Cartwright finds herself sucked into its pages. It's up to Mavis to retrieve Kitty by travelling into the past.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Gorytelling/ A Few Good Monsters
programme.desc: When Cornelius Shivers reveals that he's writing a book about the hotel, each member of the Dracula family hopes to outdo the others with their own story. After a family heirloom is destroyed, the children are considered the only suspects.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Mummyfest Destiny/ Bandages of Brothers
programme.desc: Pedro's amulet has the ability to stop time, ensuring he's always first up at the buffet. When Mavis attempts to use it, however, trouble ensues. Since Pedro and Hank aren't getting along, Mavis and Wendy suggest they look for new roommates.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Creepover Party/ Frankenstein and Son
programme.desc: Crabby’s first winning streak leads to a sponsorship deal… with Plunderman Industries? Later Ace creates a Scrammer using Sloane’s cherished childhood plaything… to disastrous results.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Portrait of Mavis As a Young Vampire/ Goo Crush
programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: UFC 225
programme.desc: Robert Whittaker takes on Yoel Romero in a rematch in from United Center in Chicago, Illinois. Robert Whittaker vs. Yoel Romero 2

programme.title: AKC National Championship Dog Show
programme.desc: Find out which dog takes home the grand prize at the AKC National Championship.

programme.title: G.O.A.T.s: The Beginnings
programme.desc: Explore the fates that pushed each GOAT to play their respective sports, as well as their doubts whether they could actually turn pro. The challenges they rose to, how success was attained, and the self-knowledge they acquired along their journey.

programme.title: G.O.A.T.s: All Access
programme.desc: The GOATS become champions, and confront the double-edged sword of fame. The rise up is one thing, maintaining a level of excellence is another. The paradoxes within America's great events, where access is a struggle.

programme.title: G.O.A.T.s: The Greatest
programme.desc: The GOATS reflect on their sports, and the meaning of their careers, mixing pride with loss. Walter caps his own career with the last photo shoot with Ali and Frazier together in a night to remember: the GOATS of the 20th century.

programme.title: Cornhole
programme.desc: Final

programme.title: E:60: Imperfect: The Roy Halladay Story
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of his perfect game, and more than two years after his tragic death, Halladay's family speaks for the first time on camera about his struggles with addiction and mental health, and the details of his fatal plane crash.

programme.title: E:60: Full Circle: Freddie Freeman
programme.desc: An in-depth profile of National League MVP Freddie Freeman. Sharing the story of the Braves' first baseman's quest to replicate the family he had and chronicling his journey through heartache, infertility and a life-threatening bout of COVID-19.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Edge of Disaster

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Blown Away
programme.desc: Ken and the Mission crew deal with intense wind and a trailer that's flipped on a bridge. James Luke and Mitch Karr battle intense wind to recover a wreck loaded with lumber.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Complete Nightmare
programme.desc: Adam must improvise when heavy winds complicate a tough recovery. The County/ Coxon crew fights a muddy wreck that puts Eric in the firing line.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Wood or Won't
programme.desc: With the last mill shutting down, Craig shifts into overdrive. The late season push hits hard on the crew and the equipment. As breakdowns add up, star driver Taylor hits his breaking point, forcing a stand-off with the boss.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Up in Smoke

programme.title: Forensic Factor: The Fifth Commandment
programme.desc: The bodies of four men are found in a wooded area known as The Hog Trails. All are severely decomposed, all are naked, and all have been genitally mutilated. Police realize they are chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Knock Knock You're Dead

programme.title: Intervention: Jade
programme.desc: At 24, Jade has a severe addiction to prescription opioids and cocaine and suffers from intense suicidal ideations.

programme.title: Intervention: Dennis
programme.desc: Dennis uses his meth and alcohol addiction to run from his past.

programme.title: Intervention: Amanda
programme.desc: Amanda has exchanged her dreams of teaching for an alcohol and crack addiction, while her family erupts in anger over her dad's chronic enabling.

programme.title: Intervention: Jenna
programme.desc: Jenna had a very strict stepfather who believed in corporal punishment. Now, she steals and deals drugs to support her IV heroin habit.

programme.title: Intervention: Nick
programme.desc: Nick, 23, uses his business talents to deal in heroin rather than business. Once the apple of his father's eye, Nick is now abandoned by his family and lives in a heroin daze.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joanne/ Kristy
programme.desc: The trauma of dealing with Joanne's hoarding was so bad for her daughter that she developed post-traumatic stress disorder. After experiencing the horror of assault, Kristi began shopping to escape her pain.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Just Made History
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Michael poses as a hipster at a farmers' market and makes an endless supply of juice. Then, things become blurry at the eye doctor, and later, shape-shifting aliens send Michael's co-worker into a frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dangerously Drinkable
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Japanese Waterless Folding Toilet
programme.desc: Michael stretches headphone cords and reality with a mystical putty, stuns a co-worker with new bathroom technology, and in the big finale, a Porta Potty becomes a Portal Potty, leaving a construction worker amazed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Quantum Mock-anics

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tooth and Consequences
