programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Problem With Chocolate Turtles and Seeds
programme.desc: Find out what trick required the camera operator to hide inside a box for the entire day and how the show got its name.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Game Friendly
programme.desc: Find out what tricks make Michael the most nervous, when the show needs extra security on hand and which trick was tried 18 times before anyone noticed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Retreat

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: On the Road

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Don't Panic!

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Special Delivery

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah get more than they bargain for when they give Todd and Julie the weekend off parental duties. With their free time, Todd and Julie rekindle their romance.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Ready to Launch
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to Tampa for Savannah's fashion line launch at HSN. Todd and Julie help Savannah overcome her on air jitters, and Nanny gets Chase in trouble at a casino.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Play in a Manger
programme.desc: Todd and Julie direct the community nativity play while also trying to teach Chloe and Grayson the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Nightmare Before Chrisley

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd and Pony Show

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lake Showdown
programme.desc: When a drunken man wreaks havoc on Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Randy Sovall and Sean Reneau deal with the aftermath. Game Warden Mike Boone tracks down the culprits responsible for an illegal dumpsite, and hooks a gator residing in a family's pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sunk in Seconds
programme.desc: On Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Morgan Inman and Austin Cryer discover that a brave citizen rescued passengers from a sunken boat. A suspected poisoning could be the cause of numerous dead doves, and alligators are found on school property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Spill
programme.desc: Game Warden Randolph McGee assesses a major gasoline spill in the local water system then tracks down a trash dumping culprit. Young jet skiers are confronted, and Game Warden Mike Boone helps relocate an alligator circling a dock.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Wild Riders
programme.desc: Game Wardens Matt Kiel and Michael Serbanic race to confront reckless jet skiers wreaking havoc at a boat ramp. A rogue ATV rider tries to lie his way out of a trespassing charge, and a crabber turns hostile when caught without a fishing license.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Blood Evidence
programme.desc: Game Wardens Morgan Inman and Justin Eddins interrogate a group of hunters suspected of trespassing and theft. Lifeless ducks are found floating mysteriously in Port Aransas, and wardens hit the water before dawn to bust clandestine shrimpers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Freshwater Crocs
programme.desc: Steve and Terri Irwin journey to the Outback of North Queensland to study the Australian freshwater crocodile in its natural environment as it struggles to survive in the diminishing rivers of the dry season.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Black Rhinos
programme.desc: Chester is home to ten critically endangered Black Rhinos. With numbers in the wild dwindling, the zoo's breeding program is a key part of preserving the species. There's concern about Kitani's ability to defend herself after damaging her horn.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: An adventurous couple wants to host their wedding at Treehouse Point, but all of the existing treehouses are booked. With some quick thinking, Pete convinces his family to make room for a new addition, and constructs a magical honeymoon suite.

programme.title: Tanked!: Most Challenging Tanks
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde countdown their experiments and toughest tank builds from season one.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Family Affair

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.desc: A surgeon and his wife are moving to Laurel from New York City, and their all-in budget goes a long way in the Mississippi town. Ben and Erin pay homage to the historic property's original elements and peculiar charm to design an amazing family home.

programme.desc: A couple is moving their family of five inland for a new job. They are looking for a large home with architectural details and space for their three kids. Their budget goes a long way as they consider a 5,000-square-foot brick beauty.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: A Southern Dream
programme.desc: A woman inherits her mom's house after she passes away, but it's far too small for her growing family. Ben and Erin come up with an ambitious plan to double the size of the house, adding a master suite and two additional bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: Home Town: Clean Lines, Open Spaces
programme.desc: After living in temporary situations after a tornado destroyed his house, a man is ready to find a home with clean lines and open spaces. Ben and Erin give his new place a complete facelift, creating an awesome midcentury modern home with a cozy study.

programme.title: Home Town: Moving to Main Street
programme.desc: A woman wants to downsize and move into town to be closer to friends and work. With her all-in budget of $125,000, she hopes to find a small home with a maintenance-free yard, a master bathroom, and space for her son.

programme.title: Home Town: A Town to Call Home
programme.desc: Kristen dreams of watching her kids grow up in a small town like she did, but as a military family, they are always on the move. Now that husband is close to retirement, they've decided to settle down so their young children have a place to call home.

programme.title: Home Town: History in the Making
programme.desc: After moving to New York City to pursue his architect career, Bill is ready to settle down with his fiance Jody in the small town he's loved since childhood.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Bucktown Bungalow vs. Spanish Colonial
programme.desc: New Orleans natives have outgrown their house and want to find a property with more space. She's an interior designer and he's a contractor, so Brittany must work with their specific tastes to find the perfect home.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: 19th-century Masterpiece vs. Coliseum Square
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple with a growing family is looking to upgrade to a bigger home. He wants a bonus space where he can work from home, and she hopes to be near parks for the kids. Later, Brittany declutters a condo to ensure it flies off the market.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Ridgewood Riviera vs. Lakeview Luxury
programme.desc: A couple sells their CA home and are in a hurry to move to New Orleans. The wife would love a new construction in Uptown, while the husband is focused on location of new job.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Lakeview Luxury vs. Bayou Beauty
programme.desc: A couple in the medical field in New Orleans want to upsize their home for their family and move closer to amenities in the city. Later, Brittany must bring a kitchen up to date to guarantee a quick sale in a historic neighbourhood.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: The Garden Home vs. Acadian Manor
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple with hectic schedules looks for a bigger home with plenty of outdoor space where they can relax after a long day.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Madisonville Manor vs. Peaceful Palace
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple is ready to upgrade their home and want to get the best bang for their buck. This means they have to move outside the city.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: A Modern Mansion and a Historic Gem
programme.desc: Brittany Picolo-Ramos helps a couple that can't decide between a historic or modern home by showing them all of their options. After picking a mansion outside of New Orleans, they make an offer far below the asking price.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Radiant River Home vs. Creekside Cottage
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple wants a bigger home in their current neighborhood. They hope to find a property with outdoor space, an open layout and room for the kids. Then, Brittany transforms a focal point wall to create an inviting feature for potential buyers.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Waterfront Paradise vs. Garden District Home
programme.desc: A couple has outgrown their home in the Lakeview neighborhood of New Orleans and want to find a property with more space for them and their kids. Meanwhile, Brittany and her team change a house's staging to create a lifestyle buyers can't turn down.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Uptown Mansion vs. Lakefront Estate
programme.desc: A couple that made a fast purchase to accommodate their relocation to New Orleans wants to find a forever home. One loves the city's historic architecture while the other hopes for something modern, leaving Brittany to find a home they both can love.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Paradise Park vs. Italian Villa
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple needs a bigger home to support their growing family. He's willing to move outside the city limits, but she doesn't want to stray too far from the city. Later, Brittany and the team use a small budget to prep a condo for sale.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Entertainers Dream vs. Broadmoor Estate
programme.desc: A single mom in New Orleans is looking for a home with more space and wouldn't mind buying a property that generates extra income. Then, Brittany makes simple changes to a home's layout to give it better flow so her clients get a quick sale.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Expanding the Team
programme.desc: With new Bigfoot cases coming in every day, the GCBRO needs new hunters to keep up with the demand. A biker reveals a face-to-face encounter with Bigfoot deep in the woods. The process of selecting new members culminates in a series of challenging tests.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: New Evidence
programme.desc: The team re-examines their findings from last year's expedition in Oregon and reveals stunning new evidence. Plus, the new Bigfoot target zone is revealed along with never-before-seen footage of the remarkable next chapter of their journey.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues
programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky. They'll spend the next two and a half weeks in search of Sasquatch, unless it finds them first.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Call and Response
programme.desc: After receiving a recording of an alleged Bigfoot call, Bryce blasts the howl over a speaker to elicit a response. With Russell positioned high on a hill and Ronny and Mireya down in the valley below, the team may get the encounter they're looking for.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Creepy Hollows
programme.desc: Deep in a Kentucky hollow, Mireya and Ronny encounter several unidentified creatures responding to Bryce's recording of a Bigfoot howl. Their investigation of an old mining road uncovers an enormous footprint, confirming they are on the right track.

programme.title: Survivorman: Bigfoot: Forest Foe
programme.desc: Les Stroud tracks Bigfoot through the ancient red cedar forests of northwest California. He then ventures into grizzly bear territory in the Canadian Rockies to investigate the site of a near-fatal Sasquatch encounter.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Great Persian Bake Off

programme.desc: The guys are presented with a unique item, a pirate's peg leg. Also, Rick has the opportunity to buy an archery bow.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with an engraved whale's tooth believed to be authentic 1800's scrimshaw.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pirate's Booty
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars find themselves sailing on strange tides when a street-legal pirate ship parade float cruises their way.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Free Willie
programme.desc: A San Francisco Giants uniform owned by baseball legend Willie Mays has Chum and Corey seeing green.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Funny Money
programme.desc: The guys check out an original work by Pablo Picasso and a saddle used by John Wayne.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Free Agent
programme.desc: Lock and load with the Pawn Stars when a D. Moore pistol from the Civil War shoots into the shop. They also put a team together to compete in a quiz competition.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Complex
programme.desc: A letter signed by Napoleon, a surreal Pedro Friedeberg figure, a 1960s Monkees talking puppet, and some original 'Dick & Jane' illustrations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Axel Pawn
programme.desc: Jam out with the Pawn Stars when a custom Fender quad guitar rocks into the shop. Then, a Wheaties box featuring Tonya Harding skates in. Rick feels the weight of it all when he checks out two steelyard scales from the 1700s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ticket to Pawn
programme.desc: A signed 1963 Beatles guitar and a 1981 Suzuki motorcycle arrive at the shop. Then, Rick tries to teach the guys some office etiquette.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Party on, Pawn
programme.desc: A bat designed by Ty Cobb and autographed by Joe Sewell is brought into the shop. Also, Rick checks out the queen of movie mobiles, the 'Wayne's World' car.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Learn the story of the most successful pizza chain on the planet, including the innovations that helped introduce pizza to the nation.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: The Classic
programme.desc: Learn the story behind the most iconic soft drink in the world and the lengths its creators took to stay on top.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All Pawns on Deck

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gotham Pawn
programme.desc: Limited edition Batman and Joker Bolin Guitars; a bronze sculpture by M.L. Snowden; a pair of signed Betty Crocker letters; a WWII era Adolf Hitler pincushion.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Seven Barreled Pawn
programme.desc: A Nock Valley gun used by the Royal Navy; an etching by Joan Miro; the first American pasta machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Declaration of Dopeness
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out a Civil War era carbine that has a surprise 'coffee grinder' in the shoulder stock. Rick contemplates if the unique item is worth a deal. Later on, a vintage skateboard deck makes an appearance in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: La La Land
programme.desc: Rick travels to Los Angeles to see what goods he can find for the shop. He discovers the largest 'Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory' prop collection in existence. Chum finds a helicopter owned by Vegas magician Dirk Arthur.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Off the Grid

programme.title: Jessie: Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Jessie is tasked with ungluing Mrs. Chesterfield's hands from her head, while Ravi attempts to uncover who switched Mrs. Chesterfield's hair gel with glue.

programme.desc: Emma and Zuri plan a romantic mystery-filled fifth first date for Jessie and Tony. Ravi, Cameron and Bertram get stuck in a giant teacup on a billboard.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: I Love Moo!
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Line and Lemur
programme.desc: Summer's coming to an end, but Dr. Pol's clients are still rushing in!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Grub-a-Dub-Dub
programme.desc: This week on The Incredible Dr. Pol, there’s trauma, drama and a piglet in peril.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: May the Horse Be With You
programme.desc: Constipated cats and grassy horses come through the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Doc Got Run Over by a Reindeer
programme.desc: A baby reindeer emergency is a 3-day dilemma.

programme.title: Big Sur: Wild California
programme.desc: California's Big Sur coast is famously breathtaking, but few know that it is a brutal, untamed world battles for survival are constantly being fought.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Under the Volcano
programme.desc: The most active volcanoes in the Lower 48 are concealed by the High Cascades' snowy crests.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Rise of the Redwood Giants
programme.desc: Discover the land of giants, where the tallest trees in the world tower over the Californian coast.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Glacier Land
programme.desc: Discover the ice-carved valleys, steep slopes, and hidden lakes of America's glacier lands.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Shadow of the Rockies
programme.desc: From low valley meadows to the peaks of its mountains, discover the amazing life around the Rockies.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Dragon's Fire
programme.desc: A dark object is captured flying among skyscrapers in China and an explosion engulfs the side of a high-rise in flames at the same moment; experts investigate this astonishing evidence of terrifying, dragon-like creatures.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Riddle of the Child Mummies
programme.desc: Archaeologists make a shocking discovery when the perfectly preserved remains of three children are unearthed from the frozen mountains of Argentina; using state-of-the-art forensics, experts investigate the bizarre circumstances behind this grisly scene.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Resurrecting the Titanic
programme.desc: The Titanic pushed the boundaries of engineering and luxury like never before, but it's also the most well-known disaster; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover if a modern vessel of equal opulence could be successfully built for the sea today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Riddle of the Child Mummies
programme.desc: Archaeologists make a shocking discovery when the perfectly preserved remains of three children are unearthed from the frozen mountains of Argentina; using state-of-the-art forensics, experts investigate the bizarre circumstances behind this grisly scene.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Resurrecting the Titanic
programme.desc: The Titanic pushed the boundaries of engineering and luxury like never before, but it's also the most well-known disaster; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover if a modern vessel of equal opulence could be successfully built for the sea today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Dragon's Fire
programme.desc: A dark object is captured flying among skyscrapers in China and an explosion engulfs the side of a high-rise in flames at the same moment; experts investigate this astonishing evidence of terrifying, dragon-like creatures.

programme.title: MythBusters: Star Wars: Revenge of the Myth
programme.desc: The team tests if Luke really could swing himself and Leia across a chasm with only his belt-rigged grappling hook, could an Ewok log swing crush an Imperial "Chicken Walker" and could Luke survive in a tauntaun's belly?

programme.title: MythBusters: Star Wars: The Myths Strike Back
programme.desc: The myths strike back when Adam and Jamie once again confront the dark side of science in a workshop not so far, far away.

programme.title: MythBusters: Failure Is Not an Option
programme.desc: It's the last ever Myths Revisited as the guys drift on dirt, fire at fish tanks and blow stuff up, all in the name of science.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Super Power Tech
programme.desc: Superpowers cross over from fiction to reality as Kari creates a cyborg cockroach, Grant crafts a cryo-gun, and Tory harnesses the power of lightning.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Jailbreak
programme.desc: Tory reconstructs an incredible hot air balloon exodus from East Germany as the team explores the science behind history's most high-flying escapes.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Crazy WWII Weapons
programme.desc: The team ranks the wackiest experimental weapons the Allies dreamed up during WWII, including bombs attached to bats and feeding Adolf Hitler estrogen.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: A Deceitful Heart
programme.desc: When Michael Lee Smith's body is found shot, partially nude, and dumped on the side of the road, the town of Berkley, Michigan is scandalized. Police are forced to sift through lies and alibis as they attempt to track down the killer.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Who Killed Katie Autry?
programme.desc: The community of Bowling Green, Kentucky is devastated when a student is assaulted and burned in her college dorm room. After the victim succumbs to her injuries without naming her attacker, police find two suspects with very different stories.

programme.title: American Monster: Unmasked
programme.desc: Rob and Lisa Whedbee are a beautiful couple who turn heads wherever they go. But when a medical trauma upends their happy family, it sets them on a path of destruction that will end in lies, accusations, and a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History
programme.desc: As a boy, Travis Spencer always told himself that the cruel pranks his older brother, Timothy, played on him were ultimately harmless. He never suspected that his brother was using him to practice methods of torture that would be used on others.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Pretends to Be Human
programme.desc: When Kelly Pletcher heard what her ex-husband Wayne Adam Ford carried in his pocket while surrendering to police, she was horrified and disgusted - but not surprised. The real surprise was that she managed to escape before becoming one of his victims.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Blue Raincoat
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears on her way home from school, police find her blue raincoat thirty miles away. It marks the start of a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Follow the Footprints
programme.desc: When the lifeless body of a young girl is found on the shore of the feather river, police hope that following a trail of footsteps and discarded articles of clothing will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Pretends to Be Human
programme.desc: When Kelly Pletcher heard what her ex-husband Wayne Adam Ford carried in his pocket while surrendering to police, she was horrified and disgusted - but not surprised. The real surprise was that she managed to escape before becoming one of his victims.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Blue Raincoat
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears on her way home from school, police find her blue raincoat thirty miles away. It marks the start of a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Shadows of Home
programme.desc: The body of a teenager is found savagely murdered just steps from her home. When the investigation stalls police are approached by a brave young woman willing to risk her own safety to get justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother, The Devil
programme.desc: Wallace Jeffs was raised to believe that his half-brother, Warren, would guide his family to salvation.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Manifesto
programme.desc: When Pastor Remington is gunned down in broad daylight at his church in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, police launch a massive manhunt to stop the shooter before he strikes again. Across town, the Odom family fear their own missing son is in grave danger.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A Florida psychiatrist and his son are shot dead, and their home ransacked. Investigators suspect robbery until they realize that only a gun and a car are missing. Now they must work backward to uncover a motive so they can track down a killer.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: Blood Brotherhood
programme.desc: Two frat brothers become inseparable, but after college their once close friendship ends in murder.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Break, Enter, Kill
programme.desc: When Lisa Fein disappears from her rural Michigan home, her young son tells police he saw her being attacked by a man in a snowmobile helmet. After a three-day search, Lisa's body is found in a shallow grave. Police set their sights on three people.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: A California couple is brutally murdered and their son is convicted of the crime. Now, the victim's sister has reached out to Chris and Melissa for help, convinced her nephew has been wrongfully convicted of committing this unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Path of Tears
programme.desc: A young girl is killed while walking her dog.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Closing Time
programme.desc: While heading up the investigation of two separate homicide cases, Detective Pat Postiglione makes a surprising discovery. The same psychotic killer is behind all the murders and he has a unique calling card.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shattered
programme.desc: When two teens discover a lifeless body in the street, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if the killer was a jealous lover or just plain unhinged. Then Kenda turns to a forensic expert to see if a young mother could possibly have hung herself.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping
programme.desc: The murder of Nancy Phister, an A-lister and socialite in a town famous for its glitzy ski resorts and celebrities, is investigated.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of Nancy Phister continues.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Final Call
programme.desc: A young wife and mother is brutally murdered in her own home, and her family shot and left for dead.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Million Dollar Murder
programme.desc: When businessman George Kogan is gunned down in broad daylight on a ritzy Upper East Side sidewalk, investigators must untangle a web of lies to figure out who wanted the millionaire dead... and how far they were willing to go to make it happen.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: The Nanny Trial
programme.desc: Louise Woodward, an 18-year-old au pair from Britain, is accused of murdering eight-month-old Matthew Eappen by violently shaking him. Her trial creates a media firestorm, searing the term 'shaken baby syndrome' into America's consciousness.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Modern Mansion Makeover
programme.desc: The builders give a modern mansion a complete log cabin makeover. They use log skins and a stacked log entryway. The pressure's on as the home will be the centerpiece of an entire log cabin community. Mark also tours a restored pioneer cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Alabama Lake House
programme.desc: The builders fight through mud and heat to turn the salvaged Shaver house from West Virginia into a two-storey lake house in Alabama. Mark experiments with new construction products, and everyone ends up in the lake.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room Predicament
programme.desc: Nicole's next project is restoring a historic mansion in the Summit district of St. Paul. Unfortunately, some key rooms have been completely ripped apart, and her first task is to rebuild the gutted powder room from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Distressed Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to taking the pink and gold kitsch out of the formal dining room. Restoring the floors, swapping out sconces and repairing the stained glass windows take the room out of the 1970s and back to 1904.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Cover Up
programme.desc: Nicole takes on the living room and study, restoring the rooms to their former 1904 glory by polishing up the original woodworking details in the rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies on the Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Super Sandwiches
programme.desc: From subs to clubs, Noah Cappe bites into the best sandwiches on the midway and dives into the debate about what really makes a sandwich with two unexpected sweets. Packed with meats, cheeses and pasta, these massive treats are fork-free carnival eats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Tastes of Texas
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson discovers the best food that Texas has to offer. Whether it's state legends like chili and barbecue, or flavors from south of the border, it's time to fill your plate in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Big Easy
programme.desc: Inspired by what he calls one of the greatest food cities in America, Bobby creates a brunch menu that would make New Orleans proud.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tuscan Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby creates an awesome menu inspired by one of his favourite places - Tuscany.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on the Run
programme.desc: A busy weekend schedule doesn't prevent Chef Bobby Flay from enjoying the brunch experience, even on the go. Take anywhere dishes include cinnamon sugar French toast sticks with maple cream, and a pressed egg sandwich.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Big Apple Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a little inspiration from his hometown to create a versatile and delicious 'Big Apple' brunch. His apple-themed menu features irresistible apple cider donuts, apple sauce parfaits with yogurt and crispy quinoa, and eggs benedict.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ohio State Fair/ North Carolina Potato Festival
programme.desc: In Ohio, Noah tries the pulled pork donut and goes fishing in North Carolina for Calabash flounder.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Indiana State Fair/ Old Canal Days
programme.desc: At the Indiana State Fair, Noah Cappe devours a colossal grilled cheese sandwich and a fried elephant ear filled with fruit and Greek tomato balls. At Old Canal Days in Illinois, he samples loaded potato bites, Chicago-style pizza pie and a donut treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Illinois State Fair/ Erie County Fair
programme.desc: Noah gets lucky in Illinois with the horseshoe sandwich, and gets Buffalo chicken pizza in New York.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland

programme.desc: While the Major Crimes unit investigates a complicated gangland shooting, Det. Amy Sykes finds she must protect the identify of a witness capable of identifying the killer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Personal Effects
programme.desc: When the squad comes across a pile of bones, they fall into a web of connections as they find their victim has an unnerving past. Meanwhile, Rusty continues to pursue his investigation of the Alice case with the help of a new friend.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Targets of Opportunity
programme.desc: After an officer-involved shooting leaves two L.A. policemen dead, the Major Crimes unit must work with the Deputy Chief of the LAPD Special Operations Bureau, Fritz Howard, to piece together this high stakes case of disguise.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hostage of Fortune
programme.desc: New information prompts the re-opening of an old kidnapping investigation, forcing Captain Raydor into partnership with a potentially corrupt FBI agent. Meanwhile, Rusty works with the team on the case to secretly gather information.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a YouTube video of a bloodied, half-naked man walking down the middle of a street with a gun goes viral, Major Crimes must decide whether the victim was targeted or a potential suicide.

programme.title: Derek Chauvin Trial Coverage
programme.desc: Watch coverage of Derek Chauvin's trial.

programme.title: Derek Chauvin Trial Coverage
programme.desc: Watch coverage of Derek Chauvin's trial.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Jenny Jones Show: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: In March of 1995, after three friends went on 'The Jenny Jones Show' to reveal a secret crush, one of them ended up dead and another was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In just a few months, fishermen can earn enough money for a family to live on for a year. However, first they must survive freezing temperatures and nearly a 100 per cent injury rate.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: As an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse, Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew. On the Wizard, damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch. Josh and Casey suffer tragedy on the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In just a few months, fishermen can earn enough money for a family to live on for a year. However, first they must survive freezing temperatures and nearly a 100 per cent injury rate.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy conspire to get Jake to do their prospecting, but the former deckhand seizes the moment to fill his own tanks. The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor. Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Problem Like Maria
programme.desc: As the super snow-moon storm peaks, the Cornelia Marie's deck becomes a gauntlet for Josh and Casey's greenest greenhorn. Ice fog overtakes the fleet as Monte scrambles to stay afloat, Harley loses an engine and Junior fights a sea-flea infestation.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: End of the Beginning
programme.desc: As the fleet mounts a final Winter season push, sad news rattles the Cornelia Marie wheelhouse. Lady Alaska greenhorn, Gabby, overcomes a painful injury to support her crew. Wild Bill's deckhands must devise a bush fix or face hauling pots by hand.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran deckhand, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Amid scuttlebutt that ports are closing due to a virus, Josh fights to get home for a reunion with his brother and Sig's daughter gets rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Irreconcilable Differences

programme.title: Weather Underground

programme.title: Weather Underground

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes
programme.desc: Scientists struggle to understand earthquakes, but new research has revealed that earthquakes can be triggered by not just from within the earth, but also by damns and reservoirs, mines and the oil drilling technique called fracking.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: When the cities of man are forgotten, Mother Nature moves quickly to reclaim what is hers. Nature’s attack on abandoned homes and buildings in Detroit, New Orleans and one Caribbean paradise is waged in three very different ways.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Volcanoes
programme.desc: This look at volcanoes and how they affect the weather includes an examination of the eruption of Mount Tambora in Indonesia in 1815.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Tsunamis
programme.desc: An examination of tsunamis, what causes them, where they happen and how they move from open sea to land.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Strangest Places
programme.desc: A look at Earth's unusual places, including underwater ecosystems, subterranean spaces and igneous rock formations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Rain
programme.desc: A look at how rain drops are formed.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Tides
programme.desc: An examination of tides including a look at the extreme tidal range of Canada's Bay of Fundy and the tidal bores of Alaska's Turnagain Arm.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Magnetic Shield
programme.desc: An examination of Earth's metallic core and how it contributes to a magnetic shield that protects the planet from harmful space radiation.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Blizzards
programme.desc: A look at how snow forms and can result in dangerous blizzards.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Gravity
programme.desc: An examination of gravity includes a report on an anomaly in Canada's Hudson Bay and a look at how earthquakes affect Earth's gravitational pull.

programme.title: Top Ten Heroes and Survivors
programme.desc: Getting caught in extreme weather can lead to dire and dangerous circumstances. For those who find themselves trapped by ferocious conditions, the spirit to survive or an offer of a heroic helping hand is often the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Top Ten Most Extreme Places

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Wonders
programme.desc: People and machine against weather. Take a look at Engineering failures, mechanical breakdowns, and human mistakes when engaging against Weather.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Rene Abides
programme.desc: Darrell tries to teach Brandon one of the toughest lessons in the storage locker game. Mary challenges Rene to a bet that has more than money at stake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There Will Be Blood Money
programme.desc: Brandi does her best to stay positive for Jarrod, while Dave is out for blood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Palm Springs Throwdown
programme.desc: The buyers head to Palm Springs, where more than the prices get hot under the desert sun. Ivy brings his game with his sights set on a high-roller locker, while Rene tries to play it cool despite the high temperatures.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bozek Is My Spirit Animal
programme.desc: There are treasures for some and turmoil for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young Gun, Old Tricks
programme.desc: An auction in Santa Ana has the buyers hoping for a high-class score among high-end vaults. Jarrod and Ivy battle between buying sprees, leaving the other buyers reeling from the action. Mary finds help of a metaphysical nature.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buys and Dolls
programme.desc: The buyers hit Torrance for tough competition over only a few quality lockers. Brandi is forced to face her fears when Jarrod gets a locker sure to give her nightmares.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Up the Ante in El Monte
programme.desc: An auction in El Monte, CA has big lockers which means big money. Dave nabs a unit that shows he knows how to party and Rene tries to slice a bit of profit from a chilling find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Let the Daves Out
programme.desc: The buyers hit a vault auction in Huntington Beach where Dave decides to bring a few friends to help him out. Mary struggles to win a vault and keep her inexperience under wraps.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Too Fast, Too Curious
programme.desc: Dave finds something that has him baffled while Ivy attempts an elusive strategy to make a score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locker Mountain High
programme.desc: The auctions begin in Upland, California, but Dan and Laura take the buyers on a wild ride to finish out the day. Ivy ends up with an eyeful, and Mary buys early in hopes of treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fontan-o-rama

programme.title: Storage Wars: Leader of the Packed
programme.desc: Bellflower, CA hosts an auction that has high stakes and big money finds. Ivy struggles through a bad buy to find something of value, while Dave tries to find trash among the treasure. Jarrod buys a unit that becomes a horror show for Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Padian: P.I.
programme.desc: Ivy is excited to return to an area known for the items he needs, but Jarrod and Brandi must employ sharp strategy to get a good locker. Darrel and Brandon are looking to score heavy which puts Mary at the bottom hoping for a top unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Thrill of a Kitty and the Agony of Smoked Meat
programme.desc: Darrell tries to smoke the competition and proves that sometimes treasure can look like trash. Mary struggles to wrangle information from the more experienced buyers, but Rene is not looking to share first place in the hunt for the best locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bid Strong and Prosper
programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers in the Night

programme.title: Botched: J-Cup Juggernaut
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif transforms a woman whose nose has been stuck at a '7 o'clock' angle, and Dr. Dubrow helps a patient get her groove back by fixing her man-boobs. Later, a woman comes from across the pond for help with her J-sized breasts.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo

programme.title: Botched: All Twerk and No Play

programme.title: Botched: To Implant or Not to Implant ... That Is the Question
programme.desc: Rodrigo Alves returns after undergoing three nasal surgeries in less than a year. Later, Terry helps a Texas chef with jarring pain from her breast implants, and a dominatrix undergoes an unconventional procedure for butt projection.

programme.title: Botched: Twin Terrors

programme.title: Botched: 4000cc's and Counting

programme.title: Bigfoot: Fear in the Woods
programme.desc: Bigfoot has roamed the earth for centuries, protected by dark forests and darker caves. The hunt for the supposed gentle giant has produced new evidence suggesting the creature is far more fierce and predatory than previously believed.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Bigfoot Moon Rising
programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: It Knows We're Here
programme.desc: Mireya's darkest nightmare comes true. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway. Bryce secures an airship to survey the final square miles for Bigfoot's heat signature.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Final Hours
programme.desc: The team believes they've finally narrowed down where Bigfoot has been hiding throughout their expedition. A high-tech drone is brought in to investigate, and what takes place next is truly astonishing.

programme.desc: A sexy vixen, who trolls sci-fi and vampire conventions, is the suspect in a murder.

programme.desc: He was a force on the football field. Then, the charming athlete was shot. His killer left few clues and the case sat cold until someone spilled a secret. What police asked the tipster to do next would make her a target. How much would she risk?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: On the Outskirts of Town
programme.desc: Halee Rathgeber enjoyed taking care of others, so it made sense that she hoped to become a nurse. What made no sense was that someone wanted her dead. The crime scene told detectives little, but a jaw-dropping moment in the courtroom spoke volumes.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: The Damage is Done
programme.desc: One inmate meets an untimely demise, and a convicted murderer breaks down the ways of prison, while a young, fresh-faced inmate learns about them. Another inmate mails a death threat to the White House and then carries out a shocking act.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: Jailing
programme.desc: A gangbanger squares off with his victim's family in court and with another inmate in jail. A young woman is arrested for a crime reminiscent of the Grinch. And jail staff must deal with a former colleague gone bad.

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento Extended Stay: The Eyes Have It
programme.desc: Whether you're ready for it, or not life can get treacherous and fast. How do people react when a normal day takes a terrifying turn?

programme.title: Lockup: Raw: SEG
programme.desc: Solitary confinement is the most common method of discipline used by prisons and jails, but it's also one of the most controversial.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Missing Bullet
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of his fiancé with an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound. Her death is ruled a suicide but authorities are puzzled when they can't find the fatal bullet. The discovery of the missing bullet turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A young woman is found with a fatal head wound and her hand on the shotgun. Her fiancé claims she killed herself but grieving family members insist the suicide scene was staged. The case goes cold until a new prosecutor takes a second look.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Red Sash Death
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is found with a red bathrobe sash knotted around her neck. Her death looks like suicide until the Medical Examiner rules homicide. The victim's 76-year-old husband is charged with murder but the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dead in the Water

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly Radner are expecting their second child, so they prepare to move out of their house. A sorority moves in next door, and the couple find that the girls are way more trouble than the fraternity. They are forced to get Teddy's help.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grade School Confidential

programme.title: The Simpsons: In Marge We Trust

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Enemy

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Homefront

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sisko and Odo discover evidence of a Starfleet plot to seize control of the planet Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Crossfire
programme.desc: Odo's hidden feelings for Kira interfere with his duty to protect a First Minister.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Return to Grace
programme.desc: A demoted Dukat enlists Kira's aid in regaining his status in the Cardassian Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: We'll Always Have Paris

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Armed for Winter
programme.desc: In Noorvik, the Hailstone family goes caribou hunting to put up meat for the winter. In Kavik, a bear poses a threat to clients at Sue’s camp. In Eagle, Andy repairs the fish wheel to protect the dogs’ food supply.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Out of Control
programme.desc: Alaskans are preparing for the winter months. In Eagle, Andy hunts for elusive moose. In Kavik, Sue seals up camp and heads to Fairbanks for a foot procedure. In Chandalar, Glenn repairs his cabin ahead of the harsh winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Unknown
programme.desc: As temperatures grow colder, the Alaskans continue to prepare for the winter months.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Highway
programme.desc: With dark winter just around the corner, Alaskans continue preparing for the winter months. In Noorvik, Chip builds a freight sled for winter travel. A blizzard strands Sue in Fairbanks and she must brave a notoriously dangerous road to get home to Kavik.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Andy maintains the snow covered trails in Eagle. In Kavik, Sue fixes her generator in order to have electricity throughout winter. The Hailstones build a new teepee for their growing family and Erik takes his wife hunting for animal hides.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Alone in the Dark
programme.desc: In Eagle, Andy maintains the snow-covered trails. In Kavik, Sue fixes her generator. In Noorvik, the Hailstones build a new teepee to shelter their growing family for upcoming hunts. In Wiseman, Eric takes his wife hunting for animal hides.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Emergency Cache

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Brie Larson in the Pearl Islands
programme.desc: Brie Larson accompanies Bear on a jungle adventure across a remote island in the Gulf of Panama.
